name: collection-queryable
description: Implement CollectionQueryable mixin and integrate into composition pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: queryable.ts: CollectionQueryable mixin using types.model().views().actions() pattern
queryable.ts: .query() view returns IQueryable builder instance
queryable.ts: IQueryable has where(), orderBy(), skip(), take() chainable methods
queryable.ts: IQueryable has toArray(), first(), count(), any() terminal operations
queryable.ts: Terminal operations are async (return Promise)
enhance-collections.ts: Compose CollectionQueryable after CollectionPersistable, before user enhancements
query/index.ts: Top-level barrel exports for entire query module
Mixin can be composed independently or alongside CollectionPersistable
Query builder is immutable (each method returns new instance)
